title: Second sleeve: BTC->ETH/SOL lead-lag event follower (leads >=30s-1min, 5-20min holding, own falsification bar)
source: Split of epic B0162 per methodology survey (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-l2-microstructure-methodology-survey.md)
why: Survey rank-3: documented 15-60s BTC->alt lead, high monthly decay risk. Independent sleeve, must NOT gate the primary. Leads >=30s for timestamp-noise robustness (broker-arrival ts).
scope: BTC 1-min move >3sigma event detector; follower entry if target not yet moved; 5-20min triple-barrier exit.
Hayashi-Yoshida lead-lag measurement on the sample to confirm the lead exists in THIS month before any backtest.
Own pre-registered bar (N>=50 events) in B0165 doc.
out_of_scope: Must not delay or gate the primary (B0166).

history.reason: feat(B0162): CEO commits Jun 15-21 L2/microstructure build; methodology survey accepted + epic split B0163-B0168
pm-day 2026-06-12: dispatched to execution-engineer (pre-data code build); HY precondition check runs on Jun-15 data

B0167 code-build scope DONE (pre-data, synthetic fixtures only): pipeline/leadlag.py (Hayashi-Yoshida lead-lag estimator + ll_events + ll_signal + causal 1-min clock) and scripts/run_ll_validation.py (HY precondition FIRST with dead-on-arrival record, registered trials 7-8 only, OTR triple-barrier 20-min timeout, base+kill fills, structural holdout refusal). 43 new tests, full suite 1903 passed. OPEN for Jun-15: the real-data HY precondition check (BTC leading >=30s, train days only) and the trials 7-8 train->validation runs; confirmatory holdout (label b0167_ll_confirmatory) remains a separate manual step per B0165 section 3.
